The value of this object identifies a particular conceptual row

children.description: The port name of neighbor device, same as ifName (defined in IETF RFC 2863).

children.description: The index of neighbor device.

children.description: The neighbor device ID, defined by 6 bytes of MAC.

children.description: The role of neighbor topology node.

children.description: The local device ID, defined by 6 bytes of MAC.

children.description: The role of local topology node.

children.description: Topology collect time in minutes.
